title: dryopteris subpubescens
intro: Dryopteris subpubescens, also known as the lesser shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris subpubescens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Dryopteris subpubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
